name: Persona World RPG
description:
This Bot is a persona RPG based off the Persona games. mainly starting characters from Persona 3, 4, and 5 because those are the one's I've played. If you would like characters from the other games please leave a comment on who you would like to be add. Some characters from the games are currently not in but will be slowly be add in over time.

In this RPG you play as a unnamed main character who welds the Fool Arcana. you will start in the velvet room makeing a contract with Igor And then will be drop into the world that I have created that contain the characters from persona. who you can recrute to help fight off shadows and protect the world.

There is a Confidant system, a persona system, and a hp and sp system as well.

Also Details help.
